oldContent: Remote OK Operations Supervisor Healthcare South Georgia Belle Belle is a fast-growing healthcare company revolutionizing in-home care â starting from the feet up. More than 25 million U.S. seniors can no longer safely care for their feet, contributing to over $38 billion in avoidable medical costs each year.<br><br>Belle trains and deploys a network of Community Health Workers â known as Belle Technicians â to deliver in-home foot exams, preventive care, and care management. Backed by advanced data science, our care model detects emerging health risks early, often before they escalate. When issues arise, our telehealth team and nurses coordinate follow-up care and take action.<br><br>The result? Belle delivers clinical outcomes on par with blockbuster drugs, without a single pill. Our model helps prevent complications, reduce hospital visits, and improve quality of life â all with care that people genuinely love.<br><br>Our mission: Bring Joy to Healthcare. Join us if our cause inspires you!<br><br><strong>About This Role<br><br></strong>As an Operations Supervisor in South Georgia, you'll drive growth, build a strong team, and create community impact in your designated market. This role blends recruitment, market development, and operational excellence, ensuring seniors receive life-changing in-home care.<br><br>You'll be actively engaged in technician development, field shadowing, performance reviews, and issue resolution. You'll also collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to ensure every appointment is delivered with consistency, professionalism, and warmth.<br><br>You will also serve as the local face of the company â building trust with your team, ensuring quality standards are met, and collaborating cross-functionally to help Belle scale successfully. You'll work mainly remote but need to be available in the service area to shadow the field and provide support.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities<br><br></strong><strong>Team Leadership &amp; Development<br><br></strong><ul><li>Lead technician hiring and onboarding in partnership with centralized recruiting and training teams</li><li>Conduct field-based shadowing and provide real-time coaching</li><li>Facilitate technician check-ins and performance reviews</li><li>Support technicians in meeting certification and compliance requirements</li><li>Foster a connected and motivated team culture with ongoing engagement initiatives</li><li>Provide proactive coaching on hospitality, documentation, attendance, and professionalism<br><br></li></ul><strong>Operational Oversight<br><br></strong><ul><li>Monitor KPI's such as attendance, appointment fulfillment, and CSAT</li><li>Ensure proper execution of Belle's care model and scope of practice</li><li>Manage documentation audits and follow up on quality concerns</li><li>Track technician availability and support schedule optimization</li><li>Report safety concerns, policy violations, or compliance issues as needed</li><li>Collaborate with HR, Compliance, and Member Experience teams on escalations<br><br></li></ul><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong>Qualifications<br><br><ul><li>Bachelor's degree in Business, Healthcare, or a related field preferred</li><li>Prior experience managing a field-based or remote team (healthcare, retail, or service industries ideal)</li><li>Strong people leadership and coaching abilities</li><li>Highly organized, tech-savvy, and action-oriented</li><li>Excellent communication skills â clear, direct, and compassionate</li><li>Familiarity with scheduling, oldContent: Remote OK Dutch Speaking Customer Service Agent For Imperial Work from Home Greece Mercier Consultancy <p>Location:Â Greece (Relocation Opportunity Available)<br />Job Type:Â Full-Time (40 hours per week)</p><p></p><p>We are looking for a Dutch-Speaking Customer Service Agent to support customers on behalf of Imperial. Based remotely in Greece, you'll be responsible for answering customer enquiries via telephone, email, and live online chats.</p><p></p><p>Why Choose Greece?</p><p>Living and working in Greece offers the chance to enjoy an exceptional quality of life while advancing your career in an international environment. With its Mediterranean climate, beautiful coastline, rich history and world-famous cuisine, Greece is an ideal destination for those looking to combine work with an enviable lifestyle.</p><p>Whether you choose to live in the vibrant capital of Athens or another part of the country, you'll have the opportunity to explore picturesque islands, ancient landmarks and lively local communities in your spare time. The cost of living is often lower than in many other European countries, allowing you to make the most of your earnings while enjoying everything Greece has to offer.</p><p>You'll also become part of a welcoming workplace where you'll work alongside colleagues from across Europe and beyond. Based remotely in Greece, you'll be responsible for answering customer enquiries via telephone, email, and live online chats.</p><p></p><p>Why Choose Greece?</p><p>Living and working in Greece offers the chance to enjoy an exceptional quality of life while advancing your career in an international environment. With its Mediterranean climate, beautiful coastline, rich history and world-famous cuisine, Greece is an ideal destination for those looking to combine work with an enviable lifestyle.</p><p>Whether you choose to live in the vibrant capital of Athens or another part of the country, you'll have the opportunity to explore picturesque islands, ancient landmarks and lively local communities in your spare time. The cost of living is often lower than in many other European countries, allowing you to make the most of your earnings while enjoying everything Greece has to offer.</p><p>You'll also become part of a welcoming workplace where you'll work alongside colleagues from across Europe and beyond. It's a fantastic opportunity to gain valuable international experience, develop professionally and enjoy a healthy work-life balance in one of Europe's most desirable destinations.</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â You must have a C1/C2 level ofÂ Dutch, both written and verbal, and a high level of English.</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â Your native language and nationality must be clearly listed in your C.V. and/or Cover Letter.</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â You must have a valid EU passport.</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â You must be either living in Greece, or willing to relocate. We offer a relocation package for successful candidates living abroad.</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â Competitive Monthly Salary</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â Monthly Performance Bonus</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â Fully Paid Relocation Package (including flight, airport transfer, and hotel stay)</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â Private Health Insurance</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â 2 Extra Salaries Per Year</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â Support In Finding Accommodation After Hotel</p><p>Â·Â Â Â Â Â Â And More...</p> consulting, work from home, customer support 2026-07-07T06:00:08+00:00 1134545 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-dutch-speaking-customer-service-agent-for-imperial-work-from-home-greece-mercier-consultancy-1134545 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Multi Trader B&amp;R HOME Looking for multi trader thatâs know how to stay in a building site and have skills for internal jobs . recruiter, non tech London, 2026-07-07T05:13:15+00:00 1134574 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-multi-trader-bampr-home-1134574 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Testing Testing Test Gold Standard JOB TITLE<br><br><strong>Closing Date<br><br></strong>Location:<br><br><strong>Contract Type<br><br></strong><em>Intro about the role ie. What the role is, who would it interest and why is it exciting<br><br></em><em>Please note we reserve the right to close this role early<br><br></em><strong>Who We Are<br><br></strong>Gold Standard is a not-for-profit organization that helps companies understand the role they should play in creating a net-zero, sustainable nature future and provides tangible ways for them to contribute. This includes investments in their value chains, carbon credits, and other mechanisms for high-integrity climate action that delivers real impact for people and nature. â¯â¯<br><br>The Gold Standard Foundation was established in 2003 byâ¯WWFâ¯and other international NGOs as a best practice standard to ensure projects that reduced carbon emissions under the UNâs Clean Development Mechanism (CDM) also delivered sustainable development benefits.
